data.current_summary: List all record sets across zones
data.summary_suggestion: Retrieve all DNS record sets across zones

data.current_summary: Disassociate a VPC router from a private zone
data.description_suggestion: Removes the association between a VPC router and a private DNS zone. This operation detaches the specified router from the zone, preventing DNS resolution for that zone within the router's VPC. Requires the zone_id parameter. Returns a 202 Accepted response indicating the disassociation request has been accepted for processing. After completion, DNS queries from the disassociated router will no longer resolve records in this private zone.

data.current_summary: Disassociate a VPC router from a private zone

After completion, DNS queries from the disassociated router will no longer resolve records in this private zone.
